items.title: Rashtriya Panchayati Raj Diwas Celebrations
items.whyInNews: Prime Minister Narendra Modi extended greetings to jan pratinidhi on the occasion of Rashtriya Panchayati Raj Diwas. The day is celebrated to commemorate the enactment of the 73rd Constitutional Amendment Act, 1992.
items.summary: The Rashtriya Panchayati Raj Diwas is observed annually on April 24 to mark the enactment of the 73rd Constitutional Amendment Act, 1992. Prime Minister Narendra Modi greeted jan pratinidhi on this occasion, highlighting the importance of grassroots democracy. The day aims to promote decentralization and empower local self-governance.
keyPoints: Rashtriya Panchayati Raj Diwas is celebrated on April 24
The 73rd Constitutional Amendment Act, 1992 was enacted on April 24, 1993
Prime Minister Narendra Modi greeted jan pratinidhi on this occasion
The day promotes decentralization and local self-governance
importantPoints: Full form of Panchayati Raj is 'System of Local Self-Government', founded in 1992, headquartered in New Delhi
Related constitutional article is Article 40 of the Indian Constitution
Historical context: The 73rd Constitutional Amendment Act, 1992 was the first major step towards decentralization in India
Key statistic: Over 2.5 lakh gram panchayats in India, covering more than 6 lakh villages
Policy implication: Empowering local self-governance to promote inclusive and sustainable development
items.examRelevance: GK: Indian Polity, Chapter - Local Self-Government

items.title: National Cooperative Development Corporation Launches Heritage Designer Collection
items.whyInNews: The National Cooperative Development Corporation (NCDC) launched a heritage designer collection, 'Sol Threads', to promote India's rich craft heritage.
items.summary: The National Cooperative Development Corporation (NCDC) launched 'Sol Threads', a heritage designer collection, to celebrate India's rich craft heritage. The collection aims to promote and preserve traditional crafts, providing a platform for artisans to showcase their skills. NCDC has been working towards empowering cooperatives and promoting rural development.

The collection aims to promote and preserve traditional crafts

Key statistic: Over 8 lakh cooperatives in India, covering more than 25 crore members

items.title: India and Netherlands Strengthen Strategic Partnership
items.whyInNews: India and the Netherlands have strengthened their strategic partnership, with a focus on trade, investment, and innovation.
items.summary: India and the Netherlands have strengthened their strategic partnership, with a focus on trade, investment, and innovation. The two countries have agreed to cooperate in areas such as agriculture, water management, and renewable energy. The partnership aims to promote economic growth and sustainable development.

The partnership focuses on trade, investment, and innovation

items.title: Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana: Government Scheme for Senior Citizens
items.whyInNews: The Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment has launched the Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana, a government scheme for senior citizens.
items.summary: The Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment has launched the Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana, a government scheme for senior citizens. The scheme aims to provide assistance to senior citizens who are living below the poverty line, by providing them with physical aids and assistive devices. The scheme is being implemented in collaboration with the Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India (ALIMCO).
keyPoints: The Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana is a government scheme for senior citizens
The scheme aims to provide assistance to senior citizens living below the poverty line
The scheme provides physical aids and assistive devices to senior citizens
The scheme is being implemented in collaboration with ALIMCO
importantPoints: Full form of ALIMCO is 'Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India', founded in 1972, headquartered in Kanpur
Related scheme is the 'National Programme for the Elderly, 2014'
Historical context: The government has been working towards promoting the welfare of senior citizens
Key statistic: Over 10 crore senior citizens in India, with 30% living below the poverty line
Policy implication: Promoting the welfare of senior citizens to achieve inclusive and sustainable development

items.title: National Education Policy 2020: Emphasis on Vocational Training
items.whyInNews: The National Education Policy 2020 has emphasized the importance of vocational training in the education system.
items.summary: The National Education Policy 2020 has emphasized the importance of vocational training in the education system. The policy aims to promote vocational training and skill development, to prepare students for the workforce. The policy has introduced several initiatives, including the establishment of vocational training centers and the introduction of vocational courses in schools.

items.title: India's First Indigenous Silicon Photonics Technology Solutions
items.whyInNews: India has developed its first indigenous silicon photonics technology solutions, a major breakthrough in the field of technology.
items.summary: India has developed its first indigenous silicon photonics technology solutions, a major breakthrough in the field of technology. The technology has been developed by a team of scientists and researchers, and is expected to have a significant impact on the field of telecommunications and data transmission. The technology is expected to provide faster and more efficient data transmission, and is expected to be used in a variety of applications, including telecommunications, data centers, and sensing technologies.

items.title: National Workshop on Cooperatives for Rural Development

items.summary: The Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare has organized a national workshop on cooperatives for rural development. The workshop aims to promote the role of cooperatives in rural development, and to discuss ways to strengthen the cooperative movement in India. items.title: India's First 5G Test Bed Launched
items.whyInNews: The Indian government has launched the country's first 5G test bed, a major step towards the development of 5G technology in India.
items.summary: The Indian government has launched the country's first 5G test bed, a major step towards the development of 5G technology in India. The test bed has been launched by the Department of Telecommunications, and is expected to provide a platform for the development and testing of 5G technology in India. The test bed is expected to be used by various stakeholders, including telecom operators, equipment manufacturers, and startups.

items.title: Virat Kohli Creates Record in IPL 2026
items.whyInNews: Virat Kohli created a record in the Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 by becoming the first batter to hit 800 boundaries. He achieved this feat while playing for Royal Challengers Bangalore (RCB) against Gujarat Titans (GT).
items.summary: Virat Kohli has set a new record in the IPL 2026 by hitting 807 boundaries in 274 matches. He is now well ahead of the second-placed Shikhar Dhawan on the list of batters with the most boundaries in the IPL. Kohli's achievement is a testament to his consistent performance in the tournament over the years.
keyPoints: Virat Kohli hit 807 boundaries in 274 IPL matches
He is the first batter to hit 800 boundaries in the IPL

importantPoints: IPL - Indian Premier League, founded in 2008, headquartered in Mumbai

Kohli's record is a significant achievement in the history of the IPL
India is ranked among the top countries in terms of cricket popularity and viewership
Kohli's achievement is a matter of national pride and showcases India's sporting talent

items.title: Economist Ashok Lahiri to Join Niti Aayog as Vice-Chairman
items.whyInNews: Economist Ashok Lahiri has been appointed as the Vice-Chairman of Niti Aayog, a think tank that advises the government on policy matters. Lahiri is a former chief economic advisor to the government of India and a member of the 15th Finance Commission.

items.title: Carlos Alcaraz Withdraws from 2026 French Open

items.title: Record Turnout in West Bengal and Tamil Nadu Polls
items.whyInNews: The recent polls in West Bengal and Tamil Nadu have seen a record turnout of voters. The high voter turnout is a significant development in the electoral process in India.

items.title: No Document or Proof will be Sought during Census 2027
items.whyInNews: The Director of Census Operations in Telangana has announced that no document or proof will be sought during the Census 2027. This is a significant development, as it aims to make the census process more inclusive and accessible.
items.summary: The decision to not seek documents or proof during the Census 2027 is a significant step towards making the census process more inclusive and accessible. The census is a crucial exercise that aims to collect data on the population and its characteristics. By not seeking documents or proof, the government aims to ensure that all citizens are counted, regardless of their documentation status.
keyPoints: No document or proof will be sought during Census 2027
The decision aims to make the census process more inclusive and accessible
The census is a crucial exercise that aims to collect data on the population
The government aims to ensure that all citizens are counted

Article 151 of the Indian Constitution deals with the Census
The decision is a significant development in the census process

The census plays a crucial role in planning and policy-making
